nasb.text: And they conferred together and with the money bought the Potter’s Field as a burial place for strangers.

esv.text: So they took counsel and bought with them the potter’s field as a burial place for strangers.

cnv.text: 他們商議之後，就用那些錢買了“陶匠的田”，用來作外國人的墳地。

ccb.text: 他们商议，决定用这些钱买下陶匠的地作为埋葬异乡人的坟场。

csbs.text: 他们商议之后，就用那钱买了陶匠的一块地，做为外国人的坟地。
